briefdescription.para: AES decrypt key source mask for KEK decryption.
AES destination key source mask for KEK decryption.
Key Size mask.
AES destination key source mask for KEK decryption.
This function handler calls XSecure_AesEncryptInit or XSecure_AesDecryptInit server API based on the Operation type.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesInitOps structure.
Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesInitOps structure.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the initialization is successful
Validate internal address fields in the copied structure

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh, u32 Size, u32 IsGmacEn)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesAadUpdate

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_AesGmacCfg and XSecure_AesUpdateAad server API.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
Lower 32 bit address of the AAD data
Higher 32 bit address of the AAD data
AAD Size
User choice to enable/disable GMAC

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the AAD update is successful
Update GMAC configuration as per the user input and calculate AAD if GMAC is enabled.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh, u32 DstAddrLow, u32 DstAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesEncUpdate

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_AesEncryptUpdate server API.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesInParams structure.
Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesInParams structure.
Lower 32 bit address of the Output buffer where encrypted data to be stored
Higher 32 bit address of the output buffer where encrypted data to be stored

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the encrypt update is successful

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_AesEncryptFinal server API.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
Lower 32 bit address of the GCM-TAG to be stored.
Higher 32 bit address of the GCM-TAG to be stored.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the encrypt final is successful

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh, u32 DstAddrLow, u32 DstAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesDecUpdate

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_AesDecryptUpdate server API.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesInParams structure.
Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesInParams structure.
Lower 32 bit address of the Output buffer where decrypted data to be stored
Higher 32 bit address of the output buffer where decrypted data to be stored

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the decrypt update is successful
Update data in AES engine which needs to be decrypted.

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_AesDecryptFinal server API.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
Lower 32 bit address of the GCM-TAG
Higher 32 bit address of the GCM-TAG

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the decrypt final is successful
Verify the GCM tag provided for the data decrypted

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 KeyInfo, u32 IvAddrLow, u32 IvAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesDecryptKek

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_AesDecryptKek server API.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
KeyInfo contains KeySize, KeyDst and KeySrc
Lower 32 bit address of the IV
Higher 32 bit address of the IV

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the decryption is successful
Check for valid decryption key source

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_AesSetDpaCm server API.

parameterdescription.para: User DpaCmCfg configuration

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the Set DpaCm is successful

briefdescription.para: This function checks for valid KeySrc.

parameterdescription.para: Aes key source

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 OperationId, u32 KeySrc, u32 KeySize, u64 IvAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesConfig

briefdescription.para: This function is used to validate key source and initialise the encryption/decryption.

parameterdescription.para: Decides whether operation is encryption/decryption
Aes key source
Aes key size
Iv address

briefdescription.para: This function calls respective IPI handler based on the API_ID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the handler execution is successful
XST_DEVICE_BUSY - If IPI channel is busy
Handle the present command based on AES core status
Call the respective API handler according to API ID

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_AesInitialize Server API.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the initialization is successful
XST_FAILURE - If PMCDMA instance is NULL.
Initialize the Aes driver so that it's ready to use

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_AesKeyZero server API.

parameterdescription.para: Key source to be zeroized

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the key zeroize is successful
Validate key source to allow clearing of keysources other than device keys

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u8 KeySize, u8 KeySrc, u32 KeyAddrLow, u32 KeyAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesKeyWrite

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_AesWriteKey server API.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
Size of the key to specify 128/256 bit key
KeySrc to which key has to be written
Lower 32 bit address of the Key
Higher 32 bit address of the Key

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the key write is successful
User not allowed to write key in boot header
Writes the key provided into the specified AES key registers

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_AesPerformOperation.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesDataBlockParams structure.
Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_AesDataBlockParams structure.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the initialization is successful
Validate internal address fields in the copied structure
Validate key source and initialise AES to encryption/decryption
Based on user's choice GCM/GMAC encryption/decryption is performed

briefdescription.para: This file contains the Xilsecure AES IPI handlers implementation.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 kal 03/04/2021 Initial release bm 05/13/2021 Updated code to use common crypto instance har 05/18/2021 Added check for key source for IPI calls am 05/21/2021 Resolved Coverity violations 4.6 har 07/14/2021 Fixed doxygen warnings kpt 07/15/2021 Added XSecure_AesInit in XSecure_AesWriteKey to avoid multiple calls from client kal 08/16/2021 Fixed magic number usage comment kal 08/18/2021 Fixed SW-BP-LOCK-RESOURCE review comments har 09/14/2021 Added check for DecKeySrc in XSecure_AesKekDecrypt 4.7 am 03/08/2022 Fixed MISRA C violations kpt 03/18/2022 Replaced XPlmi_Dmaxfr with XPlmi_MemCpy64 5.0 kpt 07/24/2022 Moved XSecure_AesExecuteDecKat, XSecure_AesExecuteDecCMKat into xsecure_kat_plat_ipihandler.c kpt 08/19/2022 Added GMAC support 5.1 skg 12/16/2022 Added XSecure_AesEncrypt/DecryptInitUpdateFinal yog 05/03/2023 Fixed MISRA C violation of Rule 10.3 vss 07/14/2023 Added support for IpiChannel check vss 09/11/2023 Fixed MISRA-C Rule 10.3 and 10.4 violation 5.3 vss 10/03/23 Added single API support for AES AAD and GMAC operations mb 03/12/24 Added AES INIT call inside AES Operation INIT API ss 04/05/24 Fixed doxygen warnings 5.4 yog 04/29/24 Fixed doxygen grouping and doxygen warnings. ma 09/17/24 Replaced XPlmi_MemCpy64 with XSecure_MemCpy64 in XSecure_AesEncUpdate and XSecure_AesDecUpdate tri 10/08/24 Configure DmaSwap before transferring IV to AES engine pre 03/02/25 Implemented task based event notification functionality for AES IPI events 5.6 mb 09/09/25 Return error code on AES IPI event handling failure obs 09/23/25 Added support for Verifying Address Range 5.7 tvp 03/12/26 Configure DmaSwap before transferring IV to AES engine for versal_2vp_p
